title: Retour de manivelle
writer: Michel Audiard, James Hadley Chase, Denys de La Patellière
actors: Michèle Morgan, Daniel Gélin, Michèle Mercier
plot: An unemployed Frenchman who saves the life of a rich man is hired as a chauffeur by the grateful man but gets caught in a murder-for-life-insurance-money scheme.
